zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester於1390年10月3日出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾肯尼爾沃斯時，他的父親Henry IV King of England23歲，母親Mary de Bohun22歲。他於大約1423年與Jacqueline Countess OF HAINAULT結婚。他去世於1447年2月23日在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester was born on 3 October 1390, in Kenilworth, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry IV King of England, was 23 and his mother, Mary de Bohun, was 22. He married Jacqueline Countess OF HAINAULT about 1423. He died on 23 February 1447, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Bury St. Edmund's, Suffolk, England: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester est né le 3 octobre 1390, à Kenilworth, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry IV King of England, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mary de Bohun, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Jacqueline Countess OF HAINAULT environ 1423. Il est décédé le 23 février 1447, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Oktober 1390 in Kenilworth, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry IV King of England 23 und seine Mutter Mary de Bohun 22. Er hat um 1423 Jacqueline Countess OF HAINAULT geheiratet. Er starb am 23. ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucesterが1390年10月3日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアケニルウオルスで生まれた時，父Henry IV King of Englandは23歳，母Mary de Bohunは22歳であった。約1423年にJacqueline Countess OF HAINAULTと結婚した。彼は1447年2月23日にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスにて埋葬された。

ko.Bury St. Edmund's, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester(이)가 1390년 10월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 켄이워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry IV King of England(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary de Bohun(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1423년 Jacqueline Countess OF HAINAULT(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1447년 2월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester nasceu em 3 de outubro de 1390, em Kenilworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry IV King of England, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Bohun, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Jacqueline Countess OF HAINAULT aproximadamente 1423. Ele faleceu em 23 de fevereiro de 1447, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Bury St. Edmund's, Suffolk, England: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester родился 3 октября 1390 г. в местности кенилворт, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry IV King of England было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mary de Bohun, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Jacqueline Countess OF HAINAULT около 1423 г. Он умер 23 февраля 1447 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.03 October 1390–23 February 1447: 3 de octubre de 1390–23 de febrero de 1447

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester nació el 3 de octubre de 1390, en Kenilworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry IV King of England, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Mary de Bohun, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Jacqueline Countess OF HAINAULT aproximadamente 1423. Murió el 23 de febrero de 1447, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
